name: Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . Recent Developments On December 20, 2025, we entered into the Merger Agreement to be acquired in a transaction valued at approximately $8.4 billion by an investor group led by Permira and Warburg Pincus, and also including Temasek Holdings (Private) Limited (Temasek) and Francisco Partners Management, L.P.
